MERGE (ta558_threatactor:ThreatActor {name:'TA558'})
ON CREATE SET ta558_threatactor.summary = 'Longtime threat group reported by researchers to have ramped up campaigns targeting travel and hospitality using fake reservation emails with links and RAR/ISO attachments delivering multiple malware variants.'
ON MATCH SET ta558_threatactor.summary = CASE WHEN coalesce(ta558_threatactor.summary,'') = '' THEN 'Longtime threat group reported by researchers to have ramped up campaigns targeting travel and hospitality using fake reservation emails with links and RAR/ISO attachments delivering multiple malware variants.' ELSE ta558_threatactor.summary END

MERGE (campaign_ta558_travel:Campaign {name:'TA558 Travel/Reservation Email Campaign (revamped 2018)'})
ON CREATE SET campaign_ta558_travel.summary = 'Campaigns using fake reservation emails; messages include links and RAR/ISO attachments that deliver a malicious payload with multiple malware variants; activity reported as ramping up after a lull tied to COVID-related travel restrictions.'
ON MATCH SET campaign_ta558_travel.summary = CASE WHEN coalesce(campaign_ta558_travel.summary,'') = '' THEN 'Campaigns using fake reservation emails; messages include links and RAR/ISO attachments that deliver a malicious payload with multiple malware variants; activity reported as ramping up after a lull tied to COVID-related travel restrictions.' ELSE campaign_ta558_travel.summary END

MERGE (incident_ta558_travel:Incident {id:'TA558-Proofpoint-ReservationEmails-RAR-ISO'})
ON CREATE SET incident_ta558_travel.type = 'intrusion',
              incident_ta558_travel.summary = 'TA558 ramped up activity targeting travel and hospitality with fake reservation emails containing links and RAR/ISO attachments delivering malicious payloads with multiple malware variants.'
ON MATCH SET incident_ta558_travel.type = CASE WHEN coalesce(incident_ta558_travel.type,'') = '' THEN 'intrusion' ELSE incident_ta558_travel.type END,
             incident_ta558_travel.summary = CASE WHEN coalesce(incident_ta558_travel.summary,'') = '' THEN 'TA558 ramped up activity targeting travel and hospitality with fake reservation emails containing links and RAR/ISO attachments delivering malicious payloads with multiple malware variants.' ELSE incident_ta558_travel.summary END

ON CREATE SET source_proofpoint.publisher = 'Proofpoint',
              source_proofpoint.title = 'Report on TA558 ramped-up campaigns using fake reservation emails with RAR/ISO attachments'
ON MATCH SET source_proofpoint.publisher = CASE WHEN coalesce(source_proofpoint.publisher,'') = '' THEN 'Proofpoint' ELSE source_proofpoint.publisher END,
             source_proofpoint.title = CASE WHEN coalesce(source_proofpoint.title,'') = '' THEN 'Report on TA558 ramped-up campaigns using fake reservation emails with RAR/ISO attachments' ELSE source_proofpoint.title END

MERGE (sector_other:Sector {name:'Other'})

             victim_travel_hosp.summary = CASE WHEN coalesce(victim_travel_hosp.summary,'') = '' THEN 'Travel and hospitality industry organizations (airline and hotel booking-related targets) referenced as targets of TA558 campaigns.' ELSE victim_travel_hosp.summary END

MERGE (campaign_ta558_travel)-[campaign_includes_ta558:includes]->(ta558_threatactor)

              campaign_targets_victim.source_id = 'proofpoint-ta558-reservation-emails-rar-iso'
